title: simpa Multi-Coloured Rainbow Stoneware Mugs – Set of 6 Gradient Colour Coffee & Tea Cups – 350ml
features: Vibrant Rainbow Design – Add a pop of colour to your kitchen with this set of 6 mugs, each featuring a lively gradient palette in purple, red, orange, blue, green and yellow.
Everyday Capacity – Each mug holds up to 350ml, making them perfect for coffee, tea, hot chocolate or any favourite warm beverage.
Durable Stoneware – Crafted from quality stoneware, these mugs offer long-lasting strength and a smooth glazed finish for everyday use.
Comfortable & Practical – Designed with a sturdy handle for a comfortable grip, each mug measures approx. 9cm (H) x 13cm (W with handle) x 7.5cm (D).
Perfect Gift Idea – A stylish and functional set, ideal as a housewarming gift, family kitchen upgrade or to brighten up any home dining collection.
description: Product Description Brighten Up Your Morning with Vibrant Rainbow Mugs Add a pop of colour to your kitchen with this set of 6 gradient mugs. Crafted from durable stoneware, these vibrant mugs are perfect for your morning coffee or tea. With a comfortable handle and 350ml capacity, they make a stylish and functional addition to any home.
